title: Issue 2301 startup CLI contract drift

non_goals: Do not alter Planning lane semantics or broaden the startup contract beyond the generic selector and compact-output paths.

owned: .github/workflows/ when needed to make the CLI contract suite required
effects: Keep generic startup output below its 10 KB compact budget.
Align selector assertions with the current route-decision contract.
Preserve required-before-claim as a claim gate rather than an implementation block.
Use the configured --active CLI invocation in generated-package proof routes.

next_action: Resolve the required-before-claim startup gate, update intentional selector-contract expectations, and run the focused plus full workspace CLI suites.

claims: Issue 2301 startup CLI contract drift is implemented, validated, and closed out honestly.
